name: Target Mini Shopping Basket - Spritz™
description:
Bring the fun of a Target run to your home with this Target Mini Shopping Basket - Spritz™. Perfect for little shoppers, this mini version of the classic red basket is great for pretend play, storage, or even a cute display piece. Lightweight and easy to carry, it’s just the right size for tiny hands or fun decor. A must-have for Target fans of all ages.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
